text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen, an assembly of the year's best
racers. The racecourse is packed with fans, all
here to watch this dream competition!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
All eyes are on the fiery clash between Narita
Brian, the Beast, and Hishi Amazon, the Queen of
the Amazons!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: It sounds like there's quite a commotion.
choice_data_list: This is the last Grand Prix of the year, after all.
This is the last Grand Prix of the year, after all.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: The last of the year, huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
(When I first entered the world of racing, I felt it
was my last hope.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
(I want to run more, to chase more. Anything to
satisfy my craving.)

text_block_list.name: Young Brian
text_block_list.text: One more race!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... You're too fast... I... I hate you!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
I caaan't... Ugh, this is hopeless, no matter how
hard I try.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
N-no way! I can't run with someone like that. I'm
scared...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
(With every rejection, I grew more and more
hungry. I felt like my soul was being chipped
away.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
(But the words my sister said to me all that time
ago were still there in the corner of my mind...)

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Come to Tracen Academy. That's where you'll
find real racing.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: It may just satisfy that hunger of yours.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Then I met someone who told me I'd have more
than enough opponents to race once I made my
debut.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Then I met someone who told me I'd have more
than enough opponents to race once I made my
debut.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Those words were tossed out so casually. But
because of Trainer and Sis, ever since my debut,
my life has—

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Brian, come here a sec! Let's do a lap around the
turf track, one-on-one!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
What are you talking about? I've never felt like
this before.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
What were you thinking teaching me this? This
feeling could become an addiction!

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text:
...I'm definitely gonna win!
No matter who I'm up against... I can do it!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
We're both going to reach greater heights. Next
time we race... I won't lose.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...Is that so? Then... until "the time comes," as you
said.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Ever since I met them, even if just a little bit, my
daily life has―

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: And at long last, Narita Brian enters the paddock!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Everyone, give her a hearty welcome!
